app.title: FaceTrace Offline
sponsor.label: Sponsor on GitHub
brand.title: FaceTrace Offline
brand.subtitle: Local face similarity comparison for selected images.
privacy.pill: All processing happens locally in your browser. No data leaves your device.
language.label: Language
notice.title: Probabilistic visual comparison, not identity verification.
notice.body: Results are not suitable for legal, forensic, employment, access-control, or definitive identity decisions. Treat the percentage as a local similarity signal only.
notice.method.body: The app aligns each detected face, extracts a 256-number ArcFace descriptor, and compares descriptors with cosine similarity. The percentage uses 100 / (1 + exp(-12 * (cosine - 0.32))), so cosine 0.32 maps to 50%. Raw cosine similarity and Euclidean distance appear only in technical details.
reference.title: Reference face
reference.dropzone.aria: Select or drop one reference image
reference.dropzone.title: Drop one reference image
reference.dropzone.hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, BMP, or another browser-readable image.
reference.help: Select a clear image with one visible face. If several faces are detected, choose the reference face below.
candidate.title: Candidate images
candidate.dropzone.aria: Select or drop one or more comparison images
candidate.dropzone.title: Drop one or many comparison images
candidate.dropzone.hint: Each detected face is compared locally against the selected reference face.
candidate.help.initial: Add a reference face first or add candidate images now; queued images will process once the reference is ready.
results.title: Results
results.list.empty: Results will appear here after a reference and candidate image are processed.
footer.disclaimer: Local browser execution only. No localhost server, uploads, telemetry, external calls, cloud APIs, or remote model downloads are used by this application.
status.model.ready: Local face models ready ({backend}). Offline mode is active.
status.model.unavailable_hint: Model not loaded. Confirm you are opening the generated self-contained index.html.
message.reference.processing: Detecting faces and extracting the local descriptor...
message.reference.ready: Reference face ready. Candidate images will be sorted by similarity percentage.
message.reference.multiple: Multiple faces detected ({count}). The selected face below is used as the reference.
message.files.none_image: No browser-readable image files were selected.
message.candidates.queue_wait_reference: {count} candidate image(s) queued. Select a reference face to start comparison.
message.candidates.loading_models: Local models are loading. Candidate images can be queued now.
message.candidates.model_unavailable: Model not loaded. Candidate images cannot be processed until the local model bundle is available.
candidate.state.multiple_faces: Multiple faces detected ({count}); closest face compared
error.bundle_missing: Local embedded model bundle is missing. This index.html copy may be incomplete.
error.decompression_missing: This browser lacks DecompressionStream. Use a recent Chromium, Firefox, or Safari.
error.bundle_corrupt: Embedded model bundle JSON is corrupt.
error.bundle_shape: Embedded model bundle has an unexpected shape.
error.tf_unavailable: Embedded TensorFlow.js did not initialize. This index.html copy may be incomplete.
error.faceapi_unavailable: Embedded face-api did not initialize. This index.html copy may be incomplete.
error.faceapi_tf_unavailable: Embedded face-api did not expose TensorFlow.js. This index.html copy may be incomplete.
error.network_disabled: Network requests are disabled in FaceTrace Offline.
error.model_or_reference_missing: Model not loaded or reference face missing
error.image_unreadable_help: Image could not be read. Select a browser-readable image file.
error.preview_generation: Image preview could not be generated
